title: Wrong multiple join result
poc: SELECT * FROM t2, t0 INNER JOIN LATERAL (SELECT t0.c0 AS col_0, t2.c0 AS col_1) as subQuery1 ON ((subQuery1.col_0)<=(0));
key_bug_features: Multiple join with LATERAL produces incorrect results
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t3(c0 INT, c1 VARCHAR);
CREATE TABLE t4(c0 FLOAT, c1 BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO t4(c0, c1) VALUES (2.5, TRUE);
SELECT * FROM t3, t4 INNER JOIN LATERAL (SELECT t3.c0 AS col_0, t4.c0 AS col_1) as subQuery2 ON (subQuery2.col_0 >= 5) RIGHT JOIN t1 ON TRUE;
